entry.title: Apple announces changes to iOS in Brazil
entry.content: Apple today announced changes impacting iOS apps in Brazil that reflect a recent agreement with Brazil’s competition regulator, CADE.

link.title: Apple announces changes to iOS in Brazil

entry.title: Apple unveils innovative features and intelligence experiences across services
entry.content: With the 2027 software releases coming this fall, Apple is bringing powerful new features to services users.

link.title: Apple unveils innovative features and intelligence experiences across services

entry.title: Apple aids app development with new intelligence frameworks and advanced tools
entry.content: Apple today introduced new intelligence capabilities, expanded productivity features in Xcode, and platform improvements.

link.title: Apple aids app development with new intelligence frameworks and advanced tools

entry.title: Apple unveils next generation of Apple Intelligence, Siri AI, and more
entry.content: Today, Apple previewed its upcoming software releases that will deliver the next generation of Apple Intelligence and introduce Siri AI.

link.title: WWDC26 highlights: Apple Intelligence, Siri AI, new parental controls, and more

entry.title: Apple Intelligence brings powerful AI capabilities into everyday experiences
entry.content: Apple unveils the next generation of Apple Intelligence, integrating powerful AI capabilities into iPhone, iPad, and Mac for more personal and helpful everyday experiences.

link.title: Apple Intelligence brings powerful AI capabilities into everyday experiences

entry.title: Apple introduces Siri AI, a profoundly more capable and personal assistant
entry.content: Apple introduces Siri AI, a profoundly more capable and personal assistant powered by Apple Intelligence, with personal context, world knowledge, and onscreen awareness.

link.title: Apple introduces Siri AI, a profoundly more capable and personal assistant

entry.title: Apple previews new child safety features
entry.content: Apple previews new child safety features that give parents greater control over their kids’ content, communication, and device access time.

link.title: Apple previews new child safety features

entry.title: Due to DMA, Siri AI delayed in EU for iOS 27 and iPadOS 27
entry.content: Due to the Digital Markets Act, Apple will not be able to ship Siri AI in the European Union with the release of iOS 27 and iPadOS 27.

link.title: Due to DMA, Siri AI delayed in EU for iOS 27 and iPadOS 27

entry.title: Apple expands App Store capabilities to help developers grow and reach new users
entry.content: New App Store capabilities will give developers more flexibility to market their apps, acquire users, and manage subscriptions.

link.title: Apple expands App Store capabilities to help developers grow and reach new users

entry.title: Apple and Major League Baseball announce July “Friday Night Baseball” schedule
entry.content: Apple and Major League Baseball have announced the July schedule for “Friday Night Baseball” on Apple TV, featuring several marquee matchups.

link.title: Apple and Major League Baseball announce July “Friday Night Baseball” schedule

entry.title: Mini Football Legends, Family Feud Pocket, and seven more hits join Apple Arcade
entry.content: Apple Arcade’s award-winning catalog of more than 200 games is adding nine new games, including My Talking Tom 2+ and Coffee Inc 2+.

link.title: Mini Football Legends, Family Feud Pocket, and seven more hits join Apple Arcade

entry.title: App Store ecosystem reaches $1.4 trillion as developers thrive globally
entry.content: Apple today announced the global App Store ecosystem facilitated over $1.4 trillion in developer billings and sales in 2025.

link.title: App Store ecosystem reaches $1.4 trillion as developers thrive globally

entry.title: Apple reveals winners of the 2026 Apple Design Awards
entry.content: Apple announces the winners of the 2026 Apple Design Awards, recognizing outstanding app and game design across six categories.

link.title: Apple reveals winners of the 2026 Apple Design Awards

entry.title: Detroit’s rising developers are supported by the Apple Developer Academy
entry.content: This year marks the Apple Developer Academy in Detroit’s fifth commencement in collaboration with MSU and the Gilbert Family Foundation.

link.title: Detroit’s rising developers are supported by the Apple Developer Academy

entry.title: Cherokee language learners bridge generations with iPad and Mac
entry.content: Through its Community Education Initiative, Apple has been working with OCU and Cherokee Nation to equip young learners with iPad and Mac.

link.title: Cherokee language learners bridge generations with iPad and Mac

entry.title: After the Whistle with Brendan Hunt and Rebecca Lowe returns
entry.content: Apple’s hit podcast ‘After the Whistle with Brendan Hunt and Rebecca Lowe’ returns for a third season June 7, with commentary on the World Cup.

link.title: After the Whistle with Brendan Hunt and Rebecca Lowe returns

entry.title: Apple TV to air first major live pro sports event shot on iPhone 17 Pro
entry.content: On May 23, Apple TV presents a special MLS match captured on iPhone 17 Pro — a first for a major professional live sports event.

link.title: Apple TV to air first major live pro sports event shot on iPhone 17 Pro

entry.title: The App Store stopped over $2.2 billion in fraudulent transactions in 2025
entry.content: In 2025, Apple prevented over $2.2 billion in potentially fraudulent transactions, adding to a total of more than $11.2 billion in the past six years.

link.title: The App Store stopped over $2.2 billion in fraudulent transactions in 2025

entry.title: Apple Sports expands to more than 90 new countries and regions
entry.content: Apple Sports is now available in more than 170 countries and regions, including more than 90 new markets.

link.title: Apple Sports expands to more than 90 new countries and regions

entry.title: Apple unveils new accessibility features, and updates with Apple Intelligence
entry.content: Apple announced major accessibility updates powered by Apple Intelligence, including new capabilities for VoiceOver, Magnifier, and Voice Control.

link.title: Apple unveils new accessibility features, and updates with Apple Intelligence
